title: voyria corymbosa
intro: Voyria corymbosa, also known as the "dog vomit slime mold", is a type of fungus that grows on trees and decaying organic matter. It is traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to act as an expectorant and a demulcent. The health benefits of Voyria corymbosa include relief from respiratory issues such as coughs and colds, as well as its potential to soothe irritated skin and mucous membranes. In herbal preparations, Voyria corymbosa is typically dried and crushed into a powder, which can be used to make teas, capsules, or topical creams.
